## Events

| Event                | Description | Type                            |
| -------------------- | ----------- | ------------------------------- |
| `zBlur`              |             | `CustomEvent<FocusEvent>`       |
| `zChange`            |             | `CustomEvent<number \| string>` |
| `zClear`             |             | `CustomEvent<void>`             |
| `zCompositionEnd`    |             | `CustomEvent<CompositionEvent>` |
| `zCompositionStart`  |             | `CustomEvent<CompositionEvent>` |
| `zCompositionUpdate` |             | `CustomEvent<CompositionEvent>` |
| `zFocus`             |             | `CustomEvent<FocusEvent>`       |
| `zInput`             |             | `CustomEvent<string>`           |
| `zKeyDown`           |             | `CustomEvent<KeyboardEvent>`    |
| `zMouseEnter`        |             | `CustomEvent<MouseEvent>`       |
| `zMouseLeave`        |             | `CustomEvent<MouseEvent>`       |


## Methods

### `clear() => Promise<void>`



#### Returns

Type: `Promise<void>`



### `getInput() => Promise<HTMLInputElement>`



#### Returns

Type: `Promise<HTMLInputElement>`



### `getTextarea() => Promise<HTMLTextAreaElement>`



#### Returns

Type: `Promise<HTMLTextAreaElement>`



### `select() => Promise<void>`



#### Returns

Type: `Promise<void>`



### `zBlur() => Promise<void>`



#### Returns

Type: `Promise<void>`



### `zFocus() => Promise<void>`



#### Returns

Type: `Promise<void>`




## Dependencies

### Used by

 - [zane-autocomplete](../autocomplete)
 - [zane-cascader](../cascader)
 - [zane-input-number](../input-number)
 - [zane-mention](../mention)
 - [zane-pagination](../pagination)
 - [zane-transfer-panel](../transfer)

### Depends on

- [zane-icon](../icon)

### Graph
```mermaid
graph TD;
  zane-input --> zane-icon
  zane-autocomplete --> zane-input
  zane-cascader --> zane-input
  zane-input-number --> zane-input
  zane-mention --> zane-input
  zane-pagination --> zane-input
  zane-transfer-panel --> zane-input
  style zane-input fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
```
